titleStmt.title: SII 37.237: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 237. (A.R. No. B 343 of 1940-41.) Chinnapasupula, Jammalamaḍugu Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab set up near the mosque.
This is dated Śaka 1643, Plava, Phālguṇa ba. 10, corresponding to 1722 A.D., March 1, Thursday.

It registers a gift of land as masīdu manya by the Dēsāyi, Reḍḍi and Karaṇam of the village to Nayanasūku pullasāni-husēnu for having erected a Masjid in the village in honour of Khudā-Rāsūl. at the top of the inscription, the name of Jaṁśara-Khānu is engraved.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
jaṁśarakhānu
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbbu
lu 1643 Agunēṭi plavanāma saṁvatsara phā
lguṇa ba 10 lu nayanasūku pullasānivahusēnugāri
ki cinavasapula dēśāyireḍḍikaraṇālu vrāśi yiccina ma
śīdu mānyadānapatraṁ māgrāmāna khōdārasūlu nimi
ttaṁ maśīdu kaṭṭiṁccinaṁdduku mānyaṁ yimmani sāhebu me
haru bānu sāhebulavāru śalavu yicciri ganuka śalavu
yiccina prakāraṁ mārājīna sthaḷa ni¨rddēśaṁ cēśi yiccina vivaraṁ .
vūri tūpu kottabhāvi tōṭa ... 0 vuppala
pāṭidōva dakṣaṇaṁ dugireḍḍikuṁṭa cēni stha
ḷaṁ khaṁ . 0 marinni yīcēni Aṁcuna 4 . 0 A .
cēnu tōṭa sarigā kolapāṭi kha ... 0 padihedumu cēnu
sthaḷaṁ ni¨rdēśaṁ cēśi yistimi ganuka mī putrapautrapā
raṁparyaṁgā Ācaṁdrā¨rkasthāyigā Anubhaviṁccagalavā
ru Ani vrāśi yiccina dānapatraṁ . reḍlu karaṇāla saṁmmatina
karaṇaṁ kaṁbagiri vrāśina dānapatraṁ . svadattā dviguṇaṁ
puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa . svadattaṁ
niṣphalaṁ bhavētu . svadatāṁ paradatāṁ vāyōharē
ta vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭiva¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kli
mīḥ . yiṁdku hiṁddulu Acēdana śēśi rāyanā
kāśilō gōhatyānikni pāpāna pōduru turkulu Acchēdana śēśirā
yanā pharadārōjukiyyā mattuku javā
budega
Digital edition of SII 37.237 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
